articles.title: Widow, 86, returns to France after being held by ICE - BBC
articles.description: Marie-Thérèse had moved to the US after reuniting with her long-lost love, an American man who died in January.
articles.content: The New York Times, citing one of her sons, reported that she was still dressed in her prison uniform, which was covered in stains and holes, when he and his siblings were reunited with her at Paris-… [+25 chars]
